raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1341 would create the California Success, Opportunity, and Academic Resilience (CalSOAR) Guaranteed Income Program to provide guaranteed direct cash assistance to homeless youth in grade 12.",
    "Approximately 15,000 students experiencing homelessness were enrolled in the 12th grade in California during the 2020-21 academic year.",
    "Over 90% of youth experiencing homelessness in California wish to pursue careers that require some form of postsecondary education.",
    "Guaranteed income for students can potentially disrupt the cycle of poverty for these students and put them on stable footing for the future.",
    "Only about 50% of students experiencing homelessness end up enrolling in higher education due to insurmountable costs."
  ]
}
```
